---
title: "Week 18 — Autocorrelation"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 18 Overview

Understand autocorrelation, detect it with Durbin-Watson and Breusch-Godfrey tests, and apply Cochrane-Orcutt correction in Python.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | Nature & Causes | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Detection Tests | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Cochrane-Orcutt in Python | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
